name: Chomper

dialog.speaker: Chomper
dialog.text: My rock is stuck. Help me!

dialog.speaker: Chomper
dialog.text: I will test you first. Get set!

win_text: You are... not bad. Fine. Be my pal.
fun_fact: T-Rex had a bite as strong as a car crash!

name: Longneck

dialog.speaker: Longneck
dialog.text: Oh! A kid! Can you help me?

choices.wrong_text: Longneck blinks. Let us both try.

dialog.speaker: Longneck
dialog.text: My egg got stuck in the mud.

battle_intro: Watch out! The mud is tough!
win_text: You got my egg! You are the best!
fun_fact: Brachiosaurus was as long as two big buses!

name: Spiky

dialog.speaker: Spiky
dialog.text: Hmm. You look fast. Are you?

choices.wrong_text: Spiky tilts its head. Sort of. OK.

dialog.speaker: Spiky
dialog.text: I need a race pal. Will you race?

choices.wrong_text: Spiky grins. Yes you are. Come on!

win_text: Ha! You are fast. Let us be pals!
fun_fact: Ankylosaurus had a tail like a wrecking ball!
